seo.title: HIIT Your Goals
seo.description: 3 weeks of HIIT and strength training, on and off the bike.

trainers.bioBodi: Jesse is a one-of-a-kind combo of laid back and hardcore. A NASM CPT, Schwinn Certified Cycling Instructor, and 200 RTY, Jesse is also a devoted Mom and former model with an MA in Psychology, and an avid runner with many half and full marathons under her belt. She knows the value of hard work and will share that fire with you in every workout!

Justin is a NASM CPT and former dancer with passion for body mechanics, proper form, and self-care. You'll have so much fun in his cycling and strength workouts that you won't realize he is putting you to WORK! Justin is a certified specialist in Corrective Exercise, Weight Loss, and Heart Rate Performance, Schwinn Cycling and Kettlebell Concepts.

data.descriptionShort: 3 weeks of HIIT and strength training, on and off the bike.
data.descriptionLong: A fun, challenging 3-Week HIIT training program on and off the bike to help you get stronger, fitter and see total body results.

commerce.title: BODi Membership Required
commerce.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

modules.equipment: Bike, Heart Rate Monitor, Dumbbells, Mat*
modules.categories: Bootcamp, Strength, Cardio, HIIT, Weight Loss, Bodyweight Training

modules.title: Is HIIT Your Goals Right For Me?
modules.content: Ready for a challenge that will supercharge your results? HIIT Your Goals is a 3-week program featuring the fun and motivating tag team trainer duo Jesse and Justin. They will show you how cross training with high intensity rides, cardio and strength floor work yield ALL the benefits. Get ready to burn fat and calories, sculpt lean muscle, rev your abs and HIIT those goals!

modules.title: What Are The Workouts Like?
modules.content: Jesse and Justin designed this intermediate/advanced program to make the most of every minute. Each workout is unique, ranges from 20-45 minutes, and utilizes either the bike, dumbbells, your bodyweight, or a combination. Expect to sweat and work hard, even if you choose the modified version, and stay tuned for your trainers' tag team floor workouts; they're sure to make you laugh.

modules.title: Tools + Equipment
modules.content: You'll need your bike, heart rate monitor, a pair of medium dumbbells and we recommend a mat for your floor work.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Jesse is a one-of-a-kind combo of laid back and hardcore. A NASM CPT, Schwinn Certified Cycling Instructor, and 200 RTY, Jesse is also a devoted Mom and former model with an MA in Psychology, and an avid runner with many half and full marathons under her belt. She knows the value of hard work and will share that fire with you in every workout!

Justin is a NASM CPT and former dancer with passion for body mechanics, proper form, and self-care. You'll have so much fun in his cycling and strength workouts that you won't realize he is putting you to WORK! Justin is a certified specialist in Corrective Exercise, Weight Loss, and Heart Rate Performance, Schwinn Cycling and Kettlebell Concepts.
